name: Conduit
long_description:
Conduit is the leading AI agent platform for hospitality operations.

Operators can create, test, and run AI agents on Conduit's harness purpose built for hospitality. On-brand agents handles the full guest journey, converting inquiries into bookings and driving upsell revenue, then runs internal operations and surfaces insights for leadership. All connected to the systems operators already use. 

Trusted by over 1000+ global hospitality brands across 120+ countries.
